description_long: This is a modern floor lamp featuring a cylindrical, gold-colored lampshade with a white inner lining. The lampshade is supported by three slender, black metal legs that converge at the base, forming a stable tripod structure. The legs are thin and evenly spaced, giving the lamp a minimalist and airy appearance. The gold lampshade adds a touch of elegance and warmth, while the black legs provide a contrasting industrial feel. The lamp is designed to stand freely on the floor and would suit contemporary urban interiors or public spaces. Its overall design is sleek, functional, and visually striking, with no visible switches or cords.
description: A modern floor lamp with a gold cylindrical shade and three slender black tripod legs, combining elegance with minimalist design.
description_view_0: The lamp is seen at an angle, highlighting the gold cylindrical shade and two of the three black tripod legs.
description_view_1: A direct front view shows all three black legs symmetrically spaced beneath the gold shade.
description_view_2: The lamp is viewed from the opposite angle of view 0, again showing the gold shade and two legs, with the third leg partially hidden.
description_view_3: A rear view similar to view 1, displaying the tripod leg arrangement and the back of the gold shade.
